list.name: Changes
list.comment: libhelper/error: Modernize error class and adapt changes to general code.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake Application.backup_plugin.executor": "Run", "KEY_ANDROID_SOURCE_PATH/home/yzbruh/Masaüstü/Projects/pmt-renovated-github": "/home/yzbruh/Masaüstü/Development/twrp", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "/home/yzbruh/.local/share/JetBrains/CLion2025.2/Shell Script/shellcheck", "Shell Script.Build (Debug).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build (Debug, with built-in plugins).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build (Release).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat Code.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Start Test.executor": "Run", "cf.advertisement.text.overridden": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/yzbruh/Masaüstü/Development/twrp", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.lookFeel", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: Default task
pmt/external: Add license notify for Android Build System

libpartition_map: Remove/rename some functions. Improvements. - The function names in Partition_t and Builder should be rebranded more appropriately. - Improve the builder, remove unnecessary elements, and provide a better structure. - Improve the test and adapt the plugins to the new functions.

libs: STL-like additions and significant improvements. - libhelper properties were separated into individual header files. Everything that was a class was rewritten to be header-only. - The logging system has been improved. - The AsyncManager class has been improved. - Overloads have been added to the Partition_t class in libpartition_map that, unlike in STL, do not throw errors but instead provide std::error_code. - Plugins, etc., have been adapted. - Some logic errors have been corrected.
libpartition_map: parse the library headers - libpartition_map properties were separated into individual header files.
github: cleanup issue templates
android: update libhelper sources in Android.bp (2)
android: update license configuration
cmake: functions: add linker script flag and remove unnecessary include directive in PLugin.hpp
cmake: functions: Allow the default plugin linker script not to be included.
pmt: apply custom sections to plugin destructors and reformat code, etc.
plugins: Instead of std::pair, create and use a custom result holder class.
cmake: Enable disabling libraries created with functions. - Deferr the building of libraries that are not currently needed.
reformat.sh: apply shellcheck suggests.
libhelper/capsule: Check the requirements with concepts.
libhelper/management: Instead of directly checking for the existence of the std::pair type in finalize() and the () operator, check for the existence of the first and second variables.
libpartition_map/definations: Correct the naming error in the title definition.
plugins: Adapt the new AsyncResult_t type.
cmake: Improve header and linker script generation at compile-time.
cmake: fixup add_plugin()
libhelper & pmt: use std::format instead of C-style formatting.
libpartition_map: move Partition_t constructors in partition.hpp to Partition.cpp.
libpartition_map: Create a cleaner Builder structure using type name abbreviations.
libpartition_map: make Partition_t type as header-only class.
info_plugin: fixup plugin.
info_plugin: Include the partition table names in the information as well.
libpartition_map/partition: The template allows input to be taken in a random order in the constructor using variadic arguments.
libhelper/logging: Allows the transfer of old log content.
libhelper/logging: improve it.
libhelper/logging: improve log content mover.
libs: improve libhelper and libpartition_map
pmt & pmt plugins: improve it.
plugins: Use a separate CMakeLists for plugins and automatically identify plugins.
libhelper: include <filesystem> directly instead <__filesystem/path.h>
android: fixup soong files.
pmt: reformat code and optimise includes
libhelper/logging: fixup log mover
libhelper/management: Create a class for easy file descriptor management.
libhelper/management: Add == and != operators to BasicUniqueFD
libhelper/management: Use const references for path inputs on constructors.
libhelper: reformat code, fixups and use new UniqueFD class.
libhelper/management: Create a class for easy file pointer management.
libhelper: add new required concepts, adapt new UniqueFP to code.

libhelper/management: BasicUniqueFP: fixup compile-time error.
`srclib/libhelper/include/libhelper/management.hpp:452:25: error: format string is not a string literal (potentially insecure) [-Werror,-Wformat-security]`
pmt: Eliminate unnecessary smart pointer usage, fix memory leaks, reformat code, etc.
libpartition_map/super: Prevent unnecessary includes.
cmake: Instead of directly reading files with the .cpp extension, reading files in the *Plugin.cpp format.
libhelper/macros: simplify the version text.
pmt: fixup version string printing
libhelper/error: Modernize error class and adapt changes to general code.

MESSAGE.value: info_plugin: Include the partition table names in the information as well.
libpartition_map/partition: The template allows input to be taken in a random order in the constructor using variadic arguments.
libhelper/logging: Allows the transfer of old log content.
libhelper/logging: improve it.
libhelper/logging: improve log content mover.
libs: improve libhelper and libpartition_map
pmt & pmt plugins: improve it.
plugins: Use a separate CMakeLists for plugins and automatically identify plugins.
libhelper: include <filesystem> directly instead <__filesystem/path.h>
android: fixup soong files.
pmt: reformat code and optimise includes
libhelper/logging: fixup log mover
libhelper/management: Create a class for easy file descriptor management.
libhelper/management: Add == and != operators to BasicUniqueFD
libhelper/management: Use const references for path inputs on constructors.
libhelper: reformat code, fixups and use new UniqueFD class.
libhelper/management: Create a class for easy file pointer management.
libhelper: add new required concepts, adapt new UniqueFP to code.

libhelper/management: BasicUniqueFP: fixup compile-time error.
`srclib/libhelper/include/libhelper/management.hpp:452:25: error: format string is not a string literal (potentially insecure) [-Werror,-Wformat-security]`
pmt: Eliminate unnecessary smart pointer usage, fix memory leaks, reformat code, etc.
libpartition_map/super: Prevent unnecessary includes.
cmake: Instead of directly reading files with the .cpp extension, reading files in the *Plugin.cpp format.
libhelper/macros: simplify the version text.
pmt: fixup version string printing
libhelper/error: Modernize error class and adapt changes to general code.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: libhelper/error: Modernize error class and adapt changes to general code.
